title: Constant Contact vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs Mailgun: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Mailgun?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Mailgun?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
